GG0170G2_CAR_TRNSFR_GOAL_CD GG0170G2 Mobility: Car transfer Goal by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal to transfer in and out of a car or van on the passenger side (does not include the ability to open/close door or fasten seat belt) by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient
